description: Helping women through their 40's and beyond to beat stress, fatigue, weight gain and hormone havoc. You might have wondered what the hell happened when you hit 40? I did! Common complaints are feeling tired, moody, stressed, more aches and pains, and its often harder to lose any stubborn weight. This is often put down to 'getting older', but these issues can be caused by hormonal imbalances. Hormones work together and if one is out of balance, it can affect the others. For example, if you are over stressed this can affect your sex hormone production and metabolism. Diet and lifestyle can dramatically affect your hormone health. This page will give you information and tips on how to look after your hormones using healthy foods, supplements and lifestyle changes.
